title: Write an SEO-Optimized Blog Post
description: Generate a complete SEO-friendly blog post with proper keyword placement, headings, and meta description.
content: Write a comprehensive SEO-optimized blog post about [TOPIC]. Include an attention-grabbing title with the primary keyword, a compelling meta description under 160 characters, proper H1/H2/H3 heading structure, keyword-rich introduction, body sections with LSI keywords, and a conclusion with a call-to-action. Target a word count of 1500-2000 words. Optimize for featured snippets by including bullet points and numbered lists.
usage_guide: Replace [TOPIC] with your target keyword or subject.

title: Viral TikTok Script Generator
description: Create engaging TikTok scripts designed to maximize views, shares, and engagement.
content: Write a viral TikTok script about [TOPIC]. Hook in the first 2 seconds with a pattern interrupt. Use trending audio suggestion. Script structure: hook (0-2s) → problem statement (2-10s) → solution/reveal (10-25s) → call-to-action (25-30s). Include visual cues for cuts, text overlays, and transitions. Add 3 relevant hashtags and a caption that encourages comments.
usage_guide: Replace [TOPIC] with your content subject. Specify if you want funny, educational, or inspirational tone.

title: High-Engagement Instagram Caption
description: Generate Instagram captions that drive comments, saves, and shares.
content: Write 5 Instagram caption options for a post about [TOPIC]. Each caption should: hook in the first line, include a question to drive comments, use 3-5 relevant hashtags, be 100-200 characters. Include a save button trigger (e.g., 'Save this for later'). For Reels: add a text overlay script and call-to-action in the first 3 seconds.
usage_guide: Replace [TOPIC] with your post subject. Specify if it's for feed, story, or Reels.

title: YouTube Video Description with SEO
description: Create YouTube descriptions that rank in search and drive clicks.
content: Write a YouTube video description for a video titled [VIDEO TITLE]. Include: a compelling first 2 lines above the fold, 5-8 relevant tags/keywords, a brief summary of what the video covers (100-150 words), 3 timestamps with chapter markers, links to related videos/playlists, a subscribe call-to-action with reason, and social media links. Use natural keyword placement for YouTube SEO.
usage_guide: Replace [VIDEO TITLE] with your actual video title. Mention the video length for accurate timestamps.

title: Email Marketing Campaign Copy
description: Generate high-converting email sequences for marketing campaigns.
content:
Write a 3-email sequence for an email marketing campaign about [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. 

Email 1 - Subject Line: Create 5 options. Body: Problem awareness, 150 words, include one case study or statistic.

Email 2 - Subject: 5 options. Body: Solution presentation, 200 words, feature 3 key benefits with bullet points.

Email 3 - Subject: 5 options. Body: Urgency/scarcity, 180 words, include a limited-time offer and clear call-to-action button copy.

All emails should follow AIDA framework, include personalization tokens, and have mobile-optimized preview text.
usage_guide: Replace [PRODUCT/SERVICE] with what you're selling. Specify your target audience for better personalization.

title: Viral Twitter/X Thread
description: Write Twitter threads that get high impressions, retweets, and engagement.
content: Write a 10-tweet Twitter thread about [TOPIC]. Tweet 1: Hook that stops the scroll (include a surprising stat or bold claim). Tweets 2-8: Value content with one key point per tweet. Use line breaks, emojis, and caps for emphasis. Tweet 9: Summary of key takeaways. Tweet 10: Call-to-action with a quote tweet request. Include 2-3 polls in the thread. Add a thread cover image suggestion.
usage_guide: Replace [TOPIC] with your thread subject. Specify your niche for better content alignment.

title: Facebook & Instagram Ad Copy
description: Create high-converting Facebook and Instagram ad copy with proper hooks and CTAs.
content:
Write 3 ad variations for [PRODUCT/SERVICE] targeting [AUDIENCE].

Ad 1 - Problem-Agitate-Solve: Hook highlighting a pain point, agitate the problem, present your solution.

Ad 2 - Social Proof: Hook with a testimonial or statistic, explain benefits, include urgency element.

Ad 3 - Feature-Benefit: Hook with a bold promise, list 5 features with corresponding benefits, clear CTA.

Each ad: primary text (125 chars), headline (40 chars), description (30 chars). Include emoji usage guidance and suggested creative direction.
usage_guide: Replace [PRODUCT/SERVICE] and [AUDIENCE] with your specifics. Mention your ad platform (Facebook/Instagram).

title: LinkedIn Thought Leadership Post
description: Build authority with LinkedIn posts that attract engagement and followers.
content:
Write a LinkedIn post about [TOPIC] positioning yourself as a thought leader.

Structure:
- Hook line (1 sentence, bold claim or provocative question)
- Personal story or insight (3-4 sentences)
- Key lesson or framework (1-2 sentences)
- Call-to-action (question to spark comments)

Include 3-5 relevant hashtags. Add a carousel/document suggestion if applicable. Length: 1300-1500 characters for maximum reach. Tag 2 relevant accounts.
usage_guide: Replace [TOPIC] with your area of expertise. Keep the personal story authentic.

title: Midjourney V6 Image Prompt
description: Generate detailed Midjourney prompts for stunning AI images.
content:
Generate 3 Midjourney V6 prompts for [SUBJECT]. Each prompt must include: subject description, environment/background, lighting (e.g., cinematic lighting, golden hour, studio lighting), color palette, mood/atmosphere, camera angle/style (e.g., wide shot, macro, aerial view), aspect ratio (--ar 16:9 or 3:2), and style modifiers (e.g., photorealistic, 8K, award-winning photography). 

Prompt 1: Photorealistic style
Prompt 2: Artistic/illustration style
Prompt 3: Cinematic/movie style
usage_guide: Replace [SUBJECT] with what you want to generate. Be specific about the scene and mood.

title: Content Repurposing Strategy
description: Turn one piece of content into 10+ formats across multiple platforms.
content:
Create a content repurposing plan for a [CONTENT TYPE] about [TOPIC].

Step 1: Identify the core message and key takeaways.
Step 2: Break down into these formats:
- LinkedIn post (expert insight angle)
- Twitter thread (step-by-step breakdown)
- Instagram carousel (visual summary)
- TikTok/Reel (60-second highlight)
- Email newsletter (deep dive with personal commentary)
- YouTube Short (quick tip)
- Blog post (comprehensive guide)
- Podcast script (conversational discussion)
- Pinterest infographic (visual data)
- Newsletter excerpt (teaser)

For each format, provide the angle, key hook, and call-to-action.
usage_guide: Replace [CONTENT TYPE] (e.g., 'webinar', 'podcast episode', 'research report') and [TOPIC] with your source content.
